scene_description:
### Foreground to Background Description  

**Road Surface (Foreground to Mid-Ground):**  
- The road is dark asphalt with a **white solid line** running along the right edge of the road (from the viewer’s perspective).  
- A **white continuous line** (dashed in the near foreground, solid further ahead) marks the center of the road.  
- The left shoulder has a **gravel surface** (mixture of small stones and dirt).  
- The right shoulder has a **gravel surface** with **white cylindrical bollards** (20–30 cm tall, spaced at intervals) at the edge of the asphalt.  

**Bollards (Right Edge, Mid-Ground):**  
- White cylindrical bollards (non-reflective, solid) are positioned along the right edge of the road, between the asphalt and the gravel shoulder.  

**Road Sign (Center Background, Left of Road Center):**  
- A **diamond-shaped yellow sign** (15–20 cm wide) with a **black pictogram** (no text; symbol resembles a curve or caution) is mounted on a post to the left of the road center.  
- A **smaller yellow sign** (10–15 cm wide) with a **black pictogram** (indecipherable) is positioned to the left of the main warning sign.  

**Vegetation (Left Side, Foreground to Background):**  
- Dense **green underbrush, ferns, and tall trees** (trunks straight, 20–30 m tall, leafy canopies) line the left side of the road, forming a **steep embankment**.  

**Vegetation (Right Side, Foreground to Background):**  
- Dense **green underbrush, ferns, and tall trees** (trunks straight, 20–30 m tall, leafy canopies) line the right side of the road, with a **less steep slope** than the left side.  

**Sky (Distant Background):**  
- A narrow section of **light blue sky** (with faint clouds) is visible between the tree canopies at the top center of the image.  

---  
**No visible objects:** Vehicles, utility poles, street lamps, traffic lights, fire hydrants, guardrails, buildings, road name signs, shop signs, banners, or text in any script. The road is two-lane with no visible license plates.

details.name: diamond-shaped yellow sign
details.reason: Yellow diamond-shaped warning signs with black pictograms are used in specific road systems.
details.focused_description: A diamond-shaped yellow sign with a black winding road symbol (two curved arrows indicating a winding road). The sign's background is yellow, and the symbol is black. It appears to be made of a reflective material, showing slight wear.

details.name: white cylindrical bollards
details.reason: The presence and style of specific bollards can be a useful regional clue.
details.focused_description: The white cylindrical bollards are vertical, cylindrical in shape, and white in color. They appear to be made of a solid material. Each bollard is upright, with no visible markings or text. The condition of the bollards appears intact, with no visible damage.

details.name: white center line
details.reason: The pattern and color of road markings help identify driving side and regional standards.
details.focused_description: The white center line is a continuous, straight (with gentle curvature following the road) line of white paint on the asphalt road. It is a single line, uniformly white in color, and appears to be in good condition with no visible text or additional markings.
